{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Account Officer",
  "description": "Queens Clinic Abuja -&nbsp;We are your healthcare provider offering consultations and treatments across various specialties. Our services have been crafted to meet most of your medical needs. Our Diagnostics service facility is designed to give easy access, timely, and high-quality diagnostics care in a safe and secure environment. Our professional Doctors and Nurses are well trained to deliver medical treatments with care and good medical ethics.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Ensure that financial transactions of the company are accurately captured, classified and posted with relevant approvals and coding instructions


Job Functions / Responsibilities


	Receivable management
	Payables management
	Ensure accurate and timely invoicing for clients and patients
	Perform regular reviews of the ledgers and other books of entries and ensure relevant reconciliation.
	Ensure confidentiality and safe keeping of accounting records and documents.
	Adhere to financial and accounting control procedures of the company.
	Carry out monthly Tax Returns (PAYE, VAT, Withholding Tax e. t. c.)
	Ensure timely pension remittance.
	Weekly/Monthly Cash Plan
	Reconciliation reports.
	Weekly Reports (which includes Receivables Summary, Payables Summary)
	Monthly Income Statement, Statement of financial Position, Analysis of Expenses, Financial Summary etc.
	POS cashier.


Requirements / Qualifications


	OND or HND in Accountancy.
	1 - 2 years of working experience
	Applicant must live in Abuja.
	Candidate must be able to demonstrate the use of accounting software such as quickbook
	Must be able to use MS. word such as Excel etc and other accounting software at a professional level.


Salary
Attractive.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to:&nbsp;glory.queensclinicabuja@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position&nbsp; as the subject of the mail.",

Account Officer Job at Queens Clinic




        
    

        
        Queens Clinic Abuja - We are your healthcare provider offering consultations and treatments across various specialties. Our services have been crafted to meet most of your medical needs. Our Diagnostics service facility is designed to give easy access, timely, and high-quality diagnostics care in a safe and secure environment. Our professional Doctors and Nurses are well trained to deliver medical treatments with care and good medical ethics.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer
Job Location: Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Ensure that financial transactions of the company are accurately captured, classified and posted with relevant approvals and coding instructions


Job Functions / Responsibilities


	Receivable management
	Payables management
	Ensure accurate and timely invoicing for clients and patients
	Perform regular reviews of the ledgers and other books of entries and ensure relevant reconciliation.
	Ensure confidentiality and safe keeping of accounting records and documents.
	Adhere to financial and accounting control procedures of the company.
	Carry out monthly Tax Returns (PAYE, VAT, Withholding Tax e. t. c.)
	Ensure timely pension remittance.
	Weekly/Monthly Cash Plan
	Reconciliation reports.
	Weekly Reports (which includes Receivables Summary, Payables Summary)
	Monthly Income Statement, Statement of financial Position, Analysis of Expenses, Financial Summary etc.
	POS cashier.


Requirements / Qualifications


	OND or HND in Accountancy.
	1 - 2 years of working experience
	Applicant must live in Abuja.
	Candidate must be able to demonstrate the use of accounting software such as quickbook
	Must be able to use MS. word such as Excel etc and other accounting software at a professional level.


Salary
Attractive.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position  as the subject of the mail.
